note: The specmap orphan ratchet (PLAYBOOK-TERRAFORM-VIBEVM-v0.2 #phase2, flipped 2026-06-10). A crate NOT listed in `exempt` is gated: `cargo xtask specmap --check` fails on any public top-level item without an own or scope!-inherited edge, unless the symbol carries a disposition (debt id) below. Crates leave `exempt` one at a time as their backfill lands (Phase 6 order).
